_note: Mock public-domain-style book records. All titles below are genuine public-domain works. No full text stored here — this is metadata only for sample/planning purposes.
_rules: Full text may only be stored for confirmed public-domain content.
All Project Gutenberg books are public domain in the US.
attribution and license_proof_url are required before any file is downloaded.
sha256_hash must be computed on download and stored alongside the file.
No file download happens in Phase 26b — file_path and sha256_hash are null in samples.
